reviews.review_description: It's a pretty shocking thing to notice that one of your favorite VR app is not available on the Oculus Quest... Definitely a reason to cancel Plex subscription for good... 🙄
I downloaded this, but why do I need to register, why can't I just use it. It looks really good, but I don't want to register to try it out.

reviews.review_title: Miserable app for a good service
reviews.review_description: I'm a big Plex fan. The web interface as well as the apps on Windows 10, Xbox, Android and Roku are great. But this app is just awful. I struggled to use it with its odd reliance on clicking the touchpad instead of the trigger, the way-to-close play button, its frequent disconnects. I know this team is much better than this. I'd like to see Plex VR reach the quality of their other offerings.
Please port to the Quest.
Google play movies support please 🙂
Appreciate adding multiuser support but you need to allow us to disable the pop up about selection and chatting with friends. It’s very annoying.

reviews.review_title: Promises a lot and nearly delivers
reviews.review_description: As a user of plex across PC, Mac and iOS platforms I was pretty excited to see the VR offering. It was the main capability that drive the purchase of my GO. As a serviceman long separation meant missing the ability to sit and watch TV with my wife. This in theory posed a solution. SibI feel slightly let down as the sharing capability is in development and so I still can’t use the GO fully. I also find the app to be slightly uncomfortable, the interface is very ‘in your face’ and can be hard to read. I have 3 main issues with the current version at the moment (notwithstanding the lack of sharing). Firstly allow the use of the trigger for menu selection without getting that really annoying message every time!! I prefer the trigger for menus rather than the thumb so can I have a choice - also don’t keep telling me about a feature that hasn’t actually been delivered yet!  Secondly let me adjust the aspect ratio. Thirdly rather than the frankly rubbish drive in scene give me a theatre. Other apps with their majestic cinemas feel much more polished. Also in the default theme remove the items from the table - they just get in the way and serve no purpose. The app will be great - it just needs developers to use it to see the niggles!

Not a good product and a total waste of space and $ since you have to pay for a subscription prior to using.  Interface is clunky and why can’t I use the trigger to select stuff like every other app??  Totally annoying and frustrating and they will not refund so know this before you buy.
The GUI is not god and needs work. Plex is good on other platforms so I think they will resolve these issues. But until then I will use other apps.

As I already use Plex, I was pleased to see the Oculus Go supported it; and on my first time using it, it seemed promising. However, I have two major issues with the Oculus app.

1. This whole "Use trigger to chat, touchpad to select thing". Really???? Ask yourself, how many people will actually want to use the watch together option, and couldn't it have been done using a different control than the trigger? 

Practically every other app I've used uses the trigger to select, so it's a habit I find hard to break. So every time I forget and press it, I get that message in my face again telling me not to. Meanwhile, trying to use the touchpad as a select without the whole screen scrolling around is ridiculous.

This is a terrible control interface. At the very least, you should provide a "trigger to select" option for those of us who are not interest in the social/chat aspects (which I suspect is the majority of us).

2. The first time I enabled this, I went to plex.tv/link, as instructed, and typed in the code. I then selected my Plex server from the drop down list, and everything was great. The next time I tried to use it, I was told my Plex server was offline. I checked on my phone and PC, and no it wasn't - not only was it online, it was online and remotely shared.

In the end, I uninstalled Plex, and installed it again, and went through the plex.tv/link thing again. Everything worked again. Once. When I came back to the app a third time - "Server is offline". 

Every time I want to use Plex on Oculus, I have to do the plex.tv/link again. That's ridiculous.
I Love it! But please make it available in Quest!!!

I’ve had my Oculus Go for a month now and one of the first apps I added was Plex. Loved it, worked great, until recently. Now everything loads and looks normal except it won’t respond to the hand control. It will point and the item will move a little but when the trigger is pushed nothing happens. Not good. Hope this is fixed soon or someone has a solution soon.

reviews.review_title: No Plex content on Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: I’ve installed the Plex App on Oculus Go and also on my phone. I can watch programmes fine on my phone but the Plex screen in Oculus Go shows the message ‘No videos found on device and no Plex media servers found. Check your email for set up instructions’ I’ve set up media server on my pc and have a user name and password. Just not sure what else I need to do. Any help appreciated thanks.

No matter what I did, got nothing more than the annoying pop up. Got tired of seeing it while trying to get it working. Deleted app and account. Very bad experience for my first time with this company.

reviews.review_title: Hard to use and get correct view
reviews.review_description: Difficult to get correct view 180/360

The Arabic subtitle is not working fine
Can you check it and solve it

reviews.review_title: Plex app on Oculus Go is a mess!
reviews.review_description:
When you try to point your controller at the “select source” button, the button jumps all over the place.  It’s like it is allergic to the controller pointer.

I have also had the same problem as others.  That is that the Plex Server is “Offline”.  I double check and the Plex Server is running without error just six feet away!

I have another issue which may be just a configuration or file naming problem.  I don’t know for sure.  When I thought things were working I would select a movie to watch and it would either not play at all or it would play with both images in each eyepiece.  Anyone have an idea what’s going on?
Bad usability. Annoying messages pop up all the time. Not all menus work. Can't use without account for local Plex server. Uninstalled!
Works
I have tried to download a server a few times and when I go to open it it says can't open file
